data.title: [ticket-graph/_links.py]: _push_tickets_branch duplicated in bash and Python — consider delegating to bash via subprocess
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: The _push_tickets_branch function is duplicated between ticket-lib.sh (bash) and ticket_graph/_links.py (Python). Future changes to the push logic must be applied in two places. The Python version could ideally delegate to the bash version via subprocess rather than re-implementing the logic.
File: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_graph/_links.py
Category: design
